Special conditions shall be mentioned where ever applicable. |                 |                                                                                   |            |            |            |            |            |            |             |             |
|                                                                                                                                   | General Remarks |                                                                                   |            |            |            |            |            |            |             |             |
|                                                                                                                                   | 1               | User ID where ever metioned will refer to the configured users in the Cosec ACMS. |            |            |            |            |            |            |             |             |
|                                                                                                                                   | 2               | For Door Type (wherever mentioned) refer the ACMS HLD Communication Document.     |            |            |            |            |            |            |             |             |
|                                                                                                                                   | 3               | Indications in Orange indicate fields for upcoming release.                       |            |            |            |            |            |            |             |             |

Refernce ID for None = FFFFFFFF Reference ID for default = FFFFFFFE Reference ID for Continue Job = FFFFFFFD | User ID will be sent if available. else blank will be sent | case1:<special function name corresponding to the special code> allowed to <user id : Username>                             Note: Marking in T&A not to be shown in <Special Function name>e.g. Over time-IN allowed to 12:xyz should be shown when user is allowed through exit switch)                                        case 4:<user id : Username> allowed to Enter/Exit using <Detail 3> for <special function name> | case1: User allowed for <special function name>                                 Note: Marking in T&A not to be shown in <Special Function name>e.g. Over time-IN User allowed                                                           case2: User Allowed                                              case3:User allowed(this should be shown when user is allowed through exit switch)                                        case 4: User allowed for <special function name> | Entry/ Exit Criteria in Detail 3 deppends on whether the event is a Going IN event or Going OUT event                  And the credential used to access the door                      case1 applicable for events having special function code from 1 to 12  case2 applicable for events which do not have special function code.     case 3 applicable for events when user is allowed to exit through exit switch               case 4 applicable for events having special function code 13 & 14 | ü                  | ü           | û |            |            |            | 463 à Template Conversion                                                                                                           | Reference ID: xxxx                                           | 10 - Failure for Lumidigm Proprietary                                                                                      | 0= FP-1                                                                                                                                                       | In case of Success: 1-100 (enrollment quality)                                                                                                                       | User ID will be sent if available. else blank will be sent | User  Template Conversion Successful for <User ID>: <User Name>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |                                                                                                                                                                       | This event must be generated when finger image to template conversion by device is successful or not.'For Field 2, refer the System Event Info Enum. In case of dual finger template, third field shall be xy where digit x represent finger index and y represents location of template. eg. 11  i.e. finger-1 template -1 or 12 i.e. finger-1 template-2 or 23 i.e. finger-2 template-1. Similarly 24, 35, 36, 47, 48, 59, 510, 611,612, 713,714,815,816,917,018,1019 and 1020 are posiible values              Enrollment Quality 1-100 is applicable .
